assignments.name: Add_Activities_from_Properties_To_Collection
assignments.label: Add Activities from Properties To Collection

assignments.description: Add FENC Activity rows to the html table
assignments.name: Add_Data_to_Table
assignments.label: Add Data to Table

assignments.name: Assign_Maximum_Measures_Cost_Filtered_Properties
assignments.label: Assign Maximum Measures Cost Filtered Properties

assignments.label: Assign Maximum Measures Count Filtered Properties

assignments.label: Assign Minimum Measures Count Filtered Properties

assignments.name: Final_Prep_for_FENC_Assessment_Type
assignments.label: Final Prep for FENC Assessment Type

assignments.name: Remove_nulls_from_OS_candidate_and_property_collections
assignments.label: Remove nulls from OS candidate and property collections

collectionProcessors.name: Filter_by_Maximum_Cost_of_Measures
collectionProcessors.label: Filter by Maximum Cost of Measures

collectionProcessors.name: Filter_by_Maximum_Count_of_Measures
collectionProcessors.label: Filter by Maximum Count of Measures

collectionProcessors.name: Filter_by_Minimum_Cost_of_Measures
collectionProcessors.label: Filter by Minimum Cost of Measures

collectionProcessors.name: Filter_by_Minimum_Count_of_Measures
collectionProcessors.label: Filter by Minimum Count of Measures

value.stringValue: North East,North West,Yorkshire and the Humber,East Midlands,West Midlands,East of England,Greater London,South East,South West,All

decisions.name: Check_Award_Figures
decisions.label: Check Award Figures
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Is not Filter by Award Amount

decisions.name: Filtering_by_Maximum_Cost_of_Measures
decisions.label: Filtering by Maximum Cost of Measures?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Not Filtering by Maximum Cost of Measures

rules.name: Yes_Filter_by_Maximum_Cost_of_Measures
rules.label: Yes - Filter by Maximum Cost of Measures

decisions.name: Filtering_by_Maximum_Count_of_Measures
decisions.label: Filtering by Maximum Count of Measures?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Not Filtering by Maximum Count of Measures

rules.name: Yes_Filter_by_Maximum_Count_of_Measures
rules.label: Yes - Filter by Maximum Count of Measures

decisions.name: Filtering_by_Minimum_Cost_of_Measures
decisions.label: Filtering by Minimum Cost of Measures?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Not Filtering by Minimum Cost of Measures

rules.name: Yes_Filter_by_Minimum_Cost_of_Measures
rules.label: Yes - Filter by Minimum Cost of Measures

decisions.name: Filtering_by_Minimum_Count_of_Measures
decisions.label: Filtering by Minimum Count of Measures?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Not Filtering by Minimum Count of Measures

rules.name: Yes_Filter_by_Minimum_Count_of_Measures
rules.label: Yes - Filter by Minimum Count of Measures

decisions.name: Use_Advanced_Property_Filters_Address_Matched
decisions.label: Use Advanced Property Filters? (Address Matched)
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Not Using Advanced Property Filters (Address Matched)

rules.name: Yes_Use_Advanced_Property_Filters_Address_Matched
rules.label: Yes - Use Advanced Property Filters (Address Matched)

Flow.description: Screenflow used to generate FENC Activity Desktop Review samples.

formulas.name: fx_NewActivityPropertyAddress
formulas.expression: IF( {!Through_FENC_Activities.Funding_Property_Detail__c} <> null, {!Through_FENC_Activities.Funding_Property_Detail__r.Property_Address__c}, IF( {!Through_FENC_Activities.OS_Candidate_Address__c} <> null, {!Through_FENC_Activities.OS_Candidate_Address__r.OS_Address__c}, IF( {!Through_FENC_Activities.Preceding_Activity__c} <> null, IF( {!Through_FENC_Activities.Preceding_Activity__r.Funding_Property_Detail__c} <> null, {!Through_FENC_Activities.Preceding_Activity__r.Funding_Property_Detail__r.Property_Address__c}, IF( {!Through_FENC_Activities.Preceding_Activity__r.OS_Candidate_Address__c} <> null, {!Through_FENC_Activities.Preceding_Activity__r.OS_Candidate_Address__r.OS_Address__c}, null ) ), null ) ) )

Flow.label: GMS - FENC Desktop Review Sample

recordLookups.description: Retrieve the FENC Assessment record Id (needed for the transform element preparing activities later on)
recordLookups.name: Get_FENC_Assessment
recordLookups.label: Get FENC Assessment

recordLookups.description: Retrieve the latest FENC Assessment Type record associated with the current FENC Assessment
recordLookups.name: Get_latest_FENC_Assessment_Type
recordLookups.label: Get latest FENC Assessment Type

recordLookups.description: Get Funding Property Detail records related to the selected Funding Awards.
recordLookups.name: Get_Properties
recordLookups.label: Get Properties

screens.description: Screen used to display a html table of the FENC Activities created
screens.name: Activities_Summary
screens.label: Activities Summary

fields.name: activitiesTable
fields.fieldText:
Create Sample for Assessment {!Get_FENC_Assessment.Name}: Confirm Sample


Desktop Review sample created successfully for the following Addresses


{!text_activitiesTable}

screens.description: Screen where user confirms whether they want to proceed with creating activities or would prefer to update filters
screens.name: Confirmation_Screen
screens.label: Confirmation Screen

fields.name: Confirmation_Screen_Title
fields.fieldText: Create Sample for Assessment {!Get_FENC_Assessment.Name}: Confirm Sample

value.stringValue: Are you sure you want to create FENC activities?
Yes, proceed with creating activities; No, I need to change the filters

fields.name: ExistingActivitiesText
fields.fieldText:
{!int_ActivitiesCount} existing activities have been found.


These will be deleted and replaced with new activities at the end of this process.


Click 'Proceed' to continue.

screens.description: Screen used to apply Funding Award filters
screens.name: Filter_Awards_Screen
screens.label: Filter Awards Screen

fields.name: Filter_Awards_Screen_Title
fields.fieldText: Create Sample for Assessment {!Get_FENC_Assessment.Name}: Choose Awards

value.stringValue: Exclude Awards that are already subject to other FENC Activities

screens.description: Screen used to apply filters to the property records
screens.name: Properties_Filter_Screen
screens.label: Properties Filter Screen

fields.name: regionsFilterTitle
fields.fieldText: Create Sample for Assessment {!Get_FENC_Assessment.Name}: Choose Properties

fields.name: TableTitleOSCandidates
fields.fieldText:
Create Sample for Assessment {!Get_FENC_Assessment.Name}: Choose Properties


Properties not yet lodged with Trustmark:

screens.description: Page used to select Funding Awards
screens.name: Select_Award_Screen
screens.label: Select Award Screen

fields.name: Select_Award_Screen_Title
fields.fieldText: Create Sample for Assessment {!Get_FENC_Assessment.Name}: Choose Awards

value.stringValue: Please choose filtered Awards for Sample

[{"apiName":"Name","guid":"column-715f","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":0,"sortable":true,"label":"Name","type":"text"},{"apiName":"Record_Type_Name__c","guid":"column-ce14","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":1,"sortable":true,"label":"Record Type Name","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"Award_Baseline_Grant_Amount__c","guid":"column-ce8a","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Award Amount","wrapText":true,"order":2,"sortable":true,"label":"Award Baseline Grant Amount","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"Total_Grant_Amount_Received__c","guid":"column-033a","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Award Amount Received","wrapText":true,"order":3,"sortable":true,"label":"Total Grant Amount Received","type":"currency"}]

fields.name: ExistingActivitiesTitle
fields.fieldText: Create Sample for Assessment {!Get_FENC_Assessment.Name}: Choose Previous High Risk FENC Activities:

screens.description: Screen used to select property records
screens.name: Select_Property_Screen
screens.label: Select Property Screen

fields.name: Select_Property_Screen_Title
fields.fieldText:
Create Sample for Assessment {!Get_FENC_Assessment.Name}: Choose Properties


Properties lodged with Trustmark:

value.stringValue: Properties lodged with Trustmark, Properties not yet lodged with Trustmark, Both

textTemplates.name: text_tableRow
textTemplates.text: Open {!Through_FENC_Activities.Funding_Award__r.Name} {!fx_NewActivityPropertyAddress}

transforms.name: Award_Ids_in_Activity_Text_Collection
transforms.label: Award Ids in Activity Text Collection

transforms.name: Prepare_Collection_of_Activities_to_Delete
transforms.label: Prepare Collection of Activities to Delete

transforms.name: Transform_FENC_activities_to_filter_duplicate_OS_candidate
transforms.label: Transform FENC activities to filter duplicate OS candidate

transforms.name: Transform_FENC_Activities_to_filter_duplicate_properties
transforms.label: Transform FENC Activities to filter duplicate properties

variables.description: Id of the FENC Assessment record the screen flow is launched from.
variables.name: recordId

value.stringValue: <table cellpadding="10"> <tr class="slds-text-title_bold" style="background-color: #F0F0F0; line-height: 25px;"> <th>Link</th> <th>Funding Award</th> <th>Property Address</th> </tr>
